horizon.eventDescription: Held during Vinili e Vinelli, September 2024. Communities co-created four visions for the future of sustainable local tourism in the Colli Tortonesi.
horizon.outcomeDescription: Participants chose Slow Food Terre Derthona to carry the community's vision forward — strengthening the territory and its agricultural culture.
horizon.conclusionDescription: Works exhibited and sold for charity at the same location where the Future Lab began. The circle closed.
